mapper.sql: id, user_id, privilege_code, source_level, status, granted_at, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_privilege_entitlement WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY granted_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM user_privilege_entitlement WHERE privilege_code = #{privilegeCode} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY granted_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_privilege_entitlement (user_id, privilege_code, source_level, status, granted_at, created_at, updated_at, version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{privilegeCode}, #{sourceLevel}, #{status}, #{grantedAt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{version})
